text.title: Definition of Done — Multi-Role Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf either applies a concrete rule or routes to `skip-this-methodology`.

decision-tree.root-question: How many distinct roles touch this feature?

conclusion.verdict: skip — single-role DoD is the developer's own checklist

branch.question: Is there a merge gate that can enforce the DoD?

conclusion.verdict: author DoD with per-role rows + wire to gate
author DoD AND establish gate (route to sdd-promotion-gate-checklist)

example.trace: input matches `role_count >= 2` → sub-question → `gate_exists == true` → conclusion ref=`per-role-row`.
